description_long: This object is a retro-style radio receiver with a rounded rectangular body finished in pastel pink. The front face features a brown speaker grille on the left and a circular brown tuning area on the right, both outlined with a slightly raised border. Below these, there are three small round buttons and a thin horizontal trim, both in brown, adding to the vintage aesthetic. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, with the same pink color and a brown trim running along the lower edge. The overall form is compact and slightly curved, reminiscent of mid-20th-century tabletop radios. The object appears to be made primarily of plastic with some metallic or painted accents.
description: A compact, pastel pink retro radio receiver with a brown speaker grille, tuning area, and buttons on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the brown speaker grille, circular tuning area, three buttons, and a horizontal trim, all set against a pink body.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a smooth, featureless pink surface with the brown trim visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: The back view displays a plain, curved pink surface with only the brown trim running horizontally near the base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a smooth pink surface and the brown trim at the bottom.
